hero_description: Experience the most reliable VTU platform in Nigeria. PayStation delivers airtime, data, and bill payments instantly with premium security.
footer_tagline: Empowering your digital lifestyle with instant VTU, data, and bill payments.
why_desc: Everything you need for your daily digital transactions in one high-performance wallet.
data_rates_desc: We offer the most affordable data plans across all networks in Nigeria.
testimonials_desc: Hear what our users and agents have to say about their experience with PayStation.
faq_subtitle: Find answers to common questions about using PayStation for your transactions.
chat_with_us: Still have questions? Chat with us
ready_to_simplify: Ready to simplify your digital life?
trust_paystation: Join thousands of Nigerians who trust PayStation for zero-failure transactions every single day.
auth_login_desc: Enter your credentials to access your wallet
auth_signup_desc: Create an account to start your journey with PayStation
auth_agree_tc: I agree to the Terms and Conditions
otp_desc: We have sent a 4-digit verification code to your email. Please enter it below.
promo_desc: Get 10% commission on every first transaction of your referrals.
agent_success_msg: Your application has been submitted for admin review.
agent_req_usage: Minimum 7 days of active usage required.
agent_req_trans: Minimum ₦10,000 total successful transactions in the last 7 days required.
feat_mobile_desc: Instant airtime and data for MTN, Airtel, Glo, and 9mobile at discounted rates.
feat_bills_desc: Pay electricity bills and cable TV subscriptions (DSTV, GOTV, Startimes) with zero stress.
feat_exam_desc: Get instant WAEC, NECO, and JAMB result checker pins delivered to your dashboard.
feat_secure_desc: Fund your wallet via multiple channels and manage your finances securely.
faq_a1_s2: If you have not registered, please click 'register' above to register now
faq_a1_s3: After login, click Fund Wallet and use any of the suitable means to fund your wallet
faq_a1_s4: Click on 'buy data' and select the desired network, data type, data size and input phone number
faq_a1_s5: Click 'send' and input your transaction PIN and send
faq_a1_s6: The receiver will receive a notification instantly of the data recharged
faq_q2: What Are The Codes For Checking Data Balance?
faq_q3: How Do I Fund My Wallet?
faq_a3_desc: You can fund your wallet using any of our Four payment means:
faq_a3_opt2: Online Payment with your ATM card details via Monnify ATM funding.
faq_a3_opt3: Manual funding by chatting up our customer service line via WhatsApp.
faq_a4_s3: Wait for 1-15 minutes, the recipient will receive notification(s) of data recharge.
agent_promo: Prices shown are for standard users. Register as an Agent to enjoy even lower wholesale prices and earn more from every transaction.
err_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
err_user_exists: A user with this email or username already exists.
err_otp_invalid: Invalid OTP code. Please check your email and try again.
success_signup: Account created! Please verify your email.
tc_agree_error: You must agree to the terms and conditions to continue.
tc_content_1_text: Welcome to PayStation. By using our services, you agree to these terms. Please read them carefully.
tc_content_2_text: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password. You agree to accept responsibility for all activities that occur under your account.
tc_content_3_text: All VTU, data, and bill payments are processed instantly. Ensure you provide correct recipient details as transactions are generally irreversible.
tc_content_4_text: You may not use PayStation for any illegal activity, including fraud, money laundering, or unauthorized access to other systems.
tc_content_5_text: PayStation is not liable for indirect or consequential damages arising from the use of our services.
